So if you're trying to sell someone in person for like, let's say a 2000 or $3,000 12 week transformation, the way to do it is not to try and sell them that over the phone or even sell them that in person on the first try, but actually sell a $99 appointment deposit so that they value, the appointment and it positions the closer if that's you or someone else to actually close the sale. So here's some of the advantages to doing this. One, you can sell all day long, which is awesome, rather than just selling in the afternoon hours, which is usually when most people have to do it because of traffic, et cetera. Second thing is that it's closest to interest. So if you're coming in for cold leads or you have cold leads that are coming in from traffic, the moment someone's ops in is the moment that their interest is highest and then it slowly degrades over time. It actually quickly degrades over time, but that first, you know, 10 minutes is when it's phone sales.
